title: asclepias standleyi
intro: Asclepias standleyi, also known as Standley's milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is a type of milkweed, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions and wounds. The plant's root and leaves contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes. Asclepias standleyi can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
